title: meliclis speciosa
side_effects: Meliclis speciosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. In some cases, excessive consumption of meliclis speciosa can lead to nausea, vomiting, and dizziness. Improper use of the plant has also been linked to interactions with certain medications, potentially causing blood pressure fluctuations and changes in heart rate. Additionally, uncontrolled use of meliclis speciosa may worsen underlying health conditions, such as diabetes or high blood pressure.
